display_font_rationale: Cormorant Garamond (Google Fonts, free) is the closest Didone in spirit to Tiffany's Sterling SSM — both share high-contrast hairline strokes and tight apertures. Bodoni 72 + Didot give the macOS/iOS native fallback. Georgia is the universal safety net.
slide_emphasis_rationale: User selected all 4 — Tiffany's voice is most distinctive on (1) cover with Didone wordmark + Tiffany Blue, (2) editorial pull-quote 'Stories. Since 1837.', (3) 188-year heritage timeline (archival force), (4) two-column lifestyle photography + sparse caption (editorial layout language).

palette_decision.rationale: Tiffany Blue is a registered trademark colour — must be the dominant chord, never softened. Pure black ink + warm off-white 'Tiffany Paper' (#FBF9F7) drawn from real footer computed bg.
